changes.before: The woman lay with her hands open on the blanket, too slack even for sleep. Jaina pulled up a stool, set two fingers above the wrist, and lifted the crystal with her other hand.
changes.after: The woman lay with her hands open on the blanket, breathing so shallowly Jaina had to watch for it, her body too slack even for sleep. Jaina pulled up a stool, setting two fingers above the wrist as she lifted the crystal with her other hand.
changes.rationale: Added ', Ving' connective tissue inside the examination beat so the scan opens in one continuous motion instead of two clipped units.

changes.before: The contamination answered at once, flaring through the crystal before she had settled her second breath, and what she had seen as trace in corpses, in spoiling grain, and in the well at Millhaven was here alive, threaded through living tissue and still moving.
changes.after: The contamination answered at once, flaring through the crystal before she had settled her second breath, and what she had seen as trace in corpses, in spoiling grain, and in the well at Millhaven was here alive, threading through living tissue and still moving.
changes.rationale: Shifted the contamination clause into active motion to keep the diagnosis exchange flowing through the same sentence rather than landing as a static report.

changes.before: "Has she been eating here?" Jaina said.
changes.after: "Has she been eating here?" Jaina asked, keeping the crystal over the woman's belly.
changes.rationale: Joined the question to the ongoing scan so the dialogue beat stays physically anchored in the diagnosis.

changes.before: "Bread and broth from the common pot."
changes.after: "Bread and broth from the common pot," Brek said, leaning in when she did not look up.
changes.rationale: Connected the answer to Jaina's uninterrupted attention, smoothing the handoff from question to response without touching later paragraphs.
